title: acianthera citrophila
intro: Acianthera citrophila is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been employed in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The roots of Acianthera citrophila are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness their medicinal properties.
